app.title: Maverx AI Training Builder
app.subtitle: AI Training Builder
cost.label: Run cost
stage.title: Turn one sentence into a full training deck
stage.subtitle: Answer a few short questions and SlideKick builds a structured, editable PowerPoint in Maverx house style - with speaker notes, pre-bite and post-bite.
assistant.name: SlideKick
assistant.intro: Hi, I am SlideKick. I will ask a few short questions so the slides match your topic, audience, timing and learning goal.
phase.outline_path: Choose how to build the outline
intake.question.0.title: What is the topic or skill to be trained?
intake.question.0.help: Be specific - e.g. "Prompt engineering for marketing", not just "AI".
intake.question.1.title: Who is the target audience?
intake.question.1.help: Name a concrete role or team - e.g. "Marketing team", "HR managers".
intake.question.2.title: What is the knowledge level of participants?
intake.question.3.title: How long is the training?
intake.question.3.help: For example: 90 minutes, 3 hours, half day.
intake.question.4.title: What is the primary learning objective?
intake.question.4.help: Make it measurable - "By the end, participants can ...".
intake.hint: Press Enter to send - Shift+Enter for a new line
intake.option.supply_outline.desc: Paste or type your training structure and SlideKick builds on it.
intake.option.ai_outline.desc: The research agent gathers input on your topic and proposes an outline to review.
outline.title: Proposed outline
outline.subtitle: Following the Maverx didactic model. Approve to start generating slides block by block.
proposal.title: Here's how I'll build this block
generating.label: Generating slides for {block}...
review.title: Review your deck
review.subtitle: Check the confidence indicator on each slide - lower scores need a closer look before you present.
confidence.label: Confidence
notes.title: Speaker notes
notes.placeholder: Speaker notes for the selected slide will appear here.
done.title: Your training is ready
done.subtitle: A complete, editable PowerPoint plus pre-bite and post-bite documents - in {lang}.
block.kickoff.description: Set learning goals, agenda and an energizer to open the session.
block.theory.description: Core concepts explained clearly for the target audience.
block.example.description: Concrete, recognizable illustrations of the theory in action.
block.exercise.description: Active application - individual, pair or group work.
block.wrapup.description: Key takeaways, link to practice and next steps.
